name: Crane Car (ASRS Stacker, scalable twin-mast)
status: Form & scaling confirmed; masts-from-floor + low (<=125 mm) lower cross beam + floor rail/overhead monorail added 2026-06-05. A few secondary defaults assumed.

params.desc: IDBMs side-by-side. DRIVES mast spacing & bed width (= laneCount x 300 mm).
IDBM length = bed depth (local Y). Variable; common 2500/2800.
Bottom bogie/carriage width on the floor rail; carriages spread by laneCount x 300.
LOW lower-cross-beam height; top <=125 mm so the IDBMs reach the lowest floor lane. = lowest reference-plane height.
Highest delivery deck height the crane serves. SCENE-driven; sizes the mast.
Mast extends this far above maxDeliveryHeight (>= +2200).
Lift-carriage support-beam height (the two beams the IDBMs rest on).
Laneway clearance berth for the Configurator footprint (NOT drawn in the Viewer).

bed.note: bed = laneCount IDBM instances; obey normal IDBM op rules.

kinematics.guides: steel floor rail (mast bottoms) + overhead monorail (mast tops)
kinematics.note: Linear travel along X (mast centerline) + vertical hoist along Z. Lowest reference plane = base.beamHeight (~floor); top of stroke = maxDeliveryHeight. Floor rail + overhead monorail are scene elements whose length/height the Configurator sets from the served array. Track length: crane END IDBM aligns with the array's OPPOSITE-end IDBM at each extreme (travelRange = arraySpan + (laneCount-1)x300).

derived.mast.height: maxDeliveryHeight + clearanceAboveTop (from the FLOOR; masts rise from the floor)
derived.lift.lowest: base.beamHeight (top of the low cross beam, ~floor)
derived.laneway: Configurator-only: footprint swept along travel (X) +/- clearance.berth (see laneway2D). NOT rendered in the Viewer.

geometry.note: Canonical parametric form (mm). FULLY SCALABLE. No platform deck; IDBMs on two coplanar support beams.
geometry.frame: Datum = base pose {position,yaw}. local X = mast-spacing/travel; local Y = bed depth; Z up.
geometry.masts: mast.count columns of mast.section^2 rising FROM THE FLOOR to maxDeliveryHeight + clearanceAboveTop.
geometry.lowerCrossBeam: LOW orange beam (height base.beamHeight, top <=125 mm) tying the mast bases, spanning mast-outer to mast-outer.
geometry.bogies: bottom carriages (mast.carriageWidth) at each mast base, riding the steel floor rail.
geometry.headBeam: orange beam joining the mast tops; top guide rollers ride the overhead monorail.
geometry.liftCarriage: two coplanar support beams (carriage.height) + mast shoes; drawn as one ordered group so the IDBMs always paint on top. The IDBM LONG BODY rests on the beams (body underside = 115 mm above the IDBM end-housing base; end housings hang ~115 mm lower & outboard). Reference plane (beam top) lifts base.beamHeight -> maxDeliveryHeight.
geometry.bed: laneCount IDBMs at 300 mm pitch along local X; each idbmLength deep along local Y (shared IDBM drawer).
geometry.colours: Masts + lower & upper cross beams = Safety Orange (0xf26522); support beams + shoes dark/grey; IDBMs and rails unchanged.
geometry.rule: IDBM module FIXED (300 wide, 200 high). Mast spacing, bed, height all scale from the params.

connectionPoints.desc: -Y bed edge: laneCount lane endA's meet upstream IDBM/rack lanes.
+Y bed edge: laneCount lane endB's meet downstream rack lanes.
Crane datum (base pose); rides the floor rail + overhead monorail along X.

datum.kinematicState: { liftZ: mm } - reference-plane height above floor (runtime; optional)

meta.author: component-authoring session (parallel)
meta.form: twin-mast stacker, masts-from-floor, low lower cross beam, floor rail + overhead monorail; lift carriage = 2 support beams (no deck)
meta.remainingAssumptions: mast.section, carriage.height, clearance.berth. Rails/monorail length & height are Configurator-set. Appearance to be revisited.
